name: Taylor Williams
title: Williams Coaching — Female-focused Hormone & Peptide Protocols
bio: Taylor Williams is a female-health coach focused on hormone replacement, peptides, and longevity protocols specifically for women across the menopause and post-menopause transitions. She is the most prolific voice in the library on female-specific peptide and hormone use — testosterone for women, progesterone protocols, GHK-Cu skin and aesthetic peptides, fasting and training paired with peptides, and the practitioner-voiced cautions women rarely hear from generic peptide content. Her Saturday Morning Coffee Talk format and detailed peptide-experience reviews give her audience a continuous mentor relationship rather than one-off explainers.
credentials: Host, Williams Coaching YouTube channel (104+ episodes)
Mentioned by name across the library as the female-protocols reference

GHK-Cu skincare, hyperpigmentation reversal, SNAP-8 ("Botox peptide"), the Glow stack
